_sample_metadata.warning: SAMPLE SUMMARY ONLY — not a merged cache, not a registry, not production, not approved geocodes, not wired into runtime.

reconciliation_categories.exact_key_same_coordinates: Same cache key string and identical lat/lng across compared sources.
reconciliation_categories.exact_key_different_coordinates: Same cache key string but incompatible coordinates; coordinate_conflict candidate.
reconciliation_categories.same_normalized_name_same_coordinates: Different key encodings but normalized name + borough + coords align.
reconciliation_categories.same_normalized_name_different_coordinat: Name match with coordinate divergence; requires human adjudication.
reconciliation_categories.same_coordinates_different_name: Coordinate cluster shared by unlike names; possible duplicate or data error.
reconciliation_categories.same_name_different_borough: Name match across boroughs; borough ambiguity or bad normalization.
reconciliation_categories.missing_borough_ambiguous: Borough missing or inconsistent between key, value, and normalized fields.
reconciliation_categories.source_specific_override_candidate: Row suitable for source_specific_override registry type after review.
reconciliation_categories.manual_override_candidate: Row suitable for manual_editorial_override after Howard gate.
reconciliation_categories.runtime_patch_conflict: Coordinate traceable only to map runtime patch, not cache/feed approval chain.
reconciliation_categories.public_feed_untraceable_coordinate: Coordinate visible in production feed without Tier 0/1 provenance.
reconciliation_categories.cache_only_no_provenance: Cache row lacks extractable approval/provenance chain for registry seed.
reconciliation_categories.possible_stale_key: updated_at or source_last_seen suggests superseded entry.
reconciliation_categories.possible_duplicate_key: Multiple keys likely referring to same place after normalization.
reconciliation_categories.source_missing: Referenced source file or row absent.
reconciliation_categories.excluded_from_seed: Blocked from registry seeding by G3/G4 safety rules.

overlap_analysis_status.recommended_next_step: Read-only clone/sync of live-feeds cache before G6 preview artifact

sample_category_assignments_not_producti.example_scope: field-desk rows with quality=geocode_failed and no coordinates
sample_category_assignments_not_producti.note: Illustrative classification only; not promoted to registry

sample_category_assignments_not_producti.example_scope: runtime patch and production feed derived coords per G3 fixtures
sample_category_assignments_not_producti.note: Design-time category; cross-cache counts pending live-feeds read
